description: Style Noteflying machine puts a new spin on summer staples with their latest range of caps. The caps feature classic designs on innovative colour patterns and cuts. This piece is great to colour block your monochrome tee. Conservative at heart? Match this with your summer staple T-shirt. You can't ever go wrong in an off-duty ensemble with this cap.Product DetailsYellow and navy blue cap with applique on the crown centreHas a slightly curved visor with mesh panelsWhite mesh paneling on crown seams for breathabilityAdjustable Velcro back strap Material and CarePolyester blendWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
